name: Grilled Dill Steak
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds beef top round, 1 1/2 inches thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the olive oil, pickle liquid, sliced pickles, and minced garlic in a large shallow dish.
2. Add the meat to the marinade and turn until fully coated.
3. Cover the dish and refrigerate for at least 8 hours, turning the meat once during marination.
4. Remove the meat from the marinade and place it on a grill or broiler rack.
5. Cook over medium heat (6 inches from the source) for about 14 to 17 minutes per side until reaching medium doneness.
6. Brush the meat with additional marinade while grilling, and season each side generously with salt and pepper after cooking.
7. If using the broiler, catch any pan juices and pour them over the meat before serving.
8. Slice the meat diagonally across the grain into thin pieces. This recipe serves 8 people.
